Operational evidence-profile rule: Mechanistic mapping support plus internal model-derived support.
Formula-style implementation: IF(AND(direct_detected_feature=TRUE, Mechanism_score>0, Model_score>0), "Evidence Tier I", next rule)
Required source fields: direct_detected_feature; Mechanism_score; Model_score; mechanism_module; model_support_raw_bin; model_source
Observed score audit / count: 15 directly measured candidates; microbiome=5; metabolome=10. Conservative_total_score range reported in S5 as audit.
Interpretation boundary: Integrated high-priority candidate fingerprints for mechanistic and state-model interpretation; not clinical biomarkers.
Manual-review trigger: Mechanism_score or Model_score derived from ambiguous/non-locked source; mechanism/model evidence mismatch; feature is model-derived meta-feature.

Directly measured feature requirement: direct_detected_feature = TRUE and Tier I rule not met
Operational evidence-profile rule: Model-prioritized or model-supported evidence with incomplete, absent, or less direct mechanism support.
Formula-style implementation: IF(AND(Tier_I_not_met, direct_detected_feature=TRUE, Model_score>0, OR(model_evidence_present=TRUE, model_prioritized_category=TRUE)), "Evidence Tier II", next rule)
Required source fields: direct_detected_feature; Model_score; model_evidence_present; candidate_category; model_prioritized_category; Mechanism_score
Observed score audit / count: 313 directly measured candidates; microbiome=198; metabolome=115. Conservative_total_score range reported in S5 as audit.
Interpretation boundary: Recurrent/model-supported exploratory feature layer for validation and hypothesis generation.
Manual-review trigger: Model_score from exploratory-only model; missing model source; candidate category inconsistent with score.

Directly measured feature requirement: direct_detected_feature = TRUE and result-level candidate inclusion criteria met
Operational evidence-profile rule: Retained traceable exploratory candidate that does not satisfy Tier I/II rules.
Formula-style implementation: IF(AND(direct_detected_feature=TRUE, result_level_evidence_present=TRUE, Tier_I_not_met, Tier_II_not_met), "Evidence Tier III", "Not tiered")
Observed score audit / count: 171 directly measured candidates; microbiome=142; metabolome=29. Some Conservative_total_score fields may be unavailable due to incomplete scoring evidence.
Interpretation boundary: Context-specific evidence-supported candidates retained for transparency; lower-priority exploratory layer.
Manual-review trigger: No result-level evidence; ambiguous feature identity; direct-detection status unclear.

Operational evidence-profile rule: Late-fusion prediction-probability features or other model-derived meta-features are not counted among 499 directly measured biological candidates.
Formula-style implementation: IF(direct_detected_feature=FALSE, "Integrated multiomics meta-feature / not counted in 499", tier rules not applied)
Observed score audit / count: 2 model-derived meta-features reported separately; not part of the 499 directly measured candidates.
Manual-review trigger: Any meta-feature mixed into directly measured microbiome/metabolome candidate counts.

Manuscript evidence tier: Formula template: =IF(direct_detected_feature<>TRUE,"Integrated multiomics meta-feature / not counted in 499",IF(AND(Mechanism_score>0,Model_score>0),"Evidence Tier I",IF(AND(Model_score>0,OR(model_evidence_present=TRUE,model_prioritized_category=TRUE)),"Evidence Tier II",IF(result_level_evidence_present=TRUE,"Evidence Tier III","Not tiered / insufficient result-level evidence"))))

Missing-evidence rule: blank fields mean unavailable evidence and are not interpreted as negative biological evidence. Missing dimensions contribute 0 to Conservative_total_score and reduce Evidence_completeness.
